name: Wool at the Gates
short_description: A minimalist tactical base defense game where you play as a powerful hero, command troops, and harness class synergies inspired by auto-battlers. Fortify your city’s defenses to withstand hordes of enraged sheep, plan your tactics, and lead epic battles in a thrilling cycle of strategy and combat.
detailed_description:
Current Content

  • 6 Heroes and 15 Hero Abilities

  • 3 Factions (Human, Orc, Elf) and 57 Faction Perks

  • 18 Troop Types and 18 Tower Types

  • 9 Classes (27 class bonuses)

  • 5 Full Maps + Tutorial Map

  • 3 Challenges per Map

  • Endless Mode (Experimental)

  • ~3 Hours of Campaign Content (not including challenges or endless)


About the Game

Inspired by games like Thronefall, SNKRX, and Warcraft 3, Wool at the Gates fuses minimalistic tactical base defense with the deep class synergy systems of auto-battlers and hero-driven action of MOBA’s to deliver an exciting loop of strategic base building and epic battles.

Defend against hordes of invading sheep through increasingly challenging rounds, each featuring tactical build phases followed by epic battles. Make strategic decisions to balance tradeoffs between building types, delving into faction talent trees, and maximizing auto-battler-style class synergies. Watch your carefully crafted synergies unfold in all out brawls between your defenses and the sheep mobs where your hero leads the charge as the ultimate commander.

Gameplay

  • Base building: Build and upgrade structures like towers, walls, and resource-generating buildings to defend against hordes of sheep—with finite build slots, every choice shapes your strategy

  • Round-based levels: Take your time planning your tactics and positioning your troops before the next wave begins, progressing through a series of increasingly difficult rounds per level

  • Auto-battler inspired synergies: Coordinate your city’s defenses to unlock powerful class bonuses and choose your playstyle

  • Faction talent trees: Construct Human, Orc, or Elf buildings to unlock perks unique to each faction

  • Fast-paced battles: Engage in nonstop action as you unleash hero abilities, optimize positioning, and command troops in real time to hold the line against relentless sheep hordes

  • Replayability: Replay levels on higher difficulties, complete challenges for rewards, and test your defenses in Endless Mode

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese
